resume.raw_text:
=== Khadim Ka - Resume.pdf ===
Khadim Ka

Bronx, New York 10459
📞 929-503-7998 | ✉️ kak392@oneonta.edu

Professional Summary

Reliable and detail-oriented Security Professional with hands-on experience in luxury retail environments

and customer-facing roles. Strong background in loss prevention, access control, and customer service.

Trilingual (English, French, Wolof) with an active NYS security license and a proven ability to maintain safety

while delivering a positive customer experience.

Certifications & Skills

• 

Active NYS Security License (8‑Hour & 16‑Hour Certifications)

• 

Loss Prevention & Store Security Procedures

• 

Access Control & Bag Checks

• 
• 

Customer Service & Conflict Awareness
Trilingual: English, French, Wolof

• 

Basic Computer Skills (Windows, Microsoft Word)

• 

Professional Communication & Reporting

Professional Experience

Dior — New York, NY

Luxury Store Security | 05/2022 – 04/2024

• 

Maintained a visible security presence on the sales floor to deter theft and ensure customer and

employee safety.

• 

Monitored customer traffic entering and exiting the store, identifying suspicious activity.

• 

Conducted employee bag checks at closing in compliance with store policy.

• 

Secured stockroom areas and tracked product movement to reduce shrinkage.

• 

Greeted customers professionally while supporting a high-end retail environment.

1

 Baar Baar Indian Restaurant — New York, NY

Waiter | 09/2021 – 05/2022

• 

Delivered high-quality customer service in a fast-paced dining environment.

• 

Demonstrated strong menu knowledge to assist guests and personalize service.

• 

Maintained table settings, cleared courses, and ensured guest satisfaction.

• 

Built positive guest relationships to enhance repeat business.

Back of House Associate | 12/2020 – 08/2021

• 

Maintained cleanliness and safety standards across assigned workstations.

• 

Assisted with setup, cleanup, prep work, and equipment maintenance.

• 

Supported front- and back-of-house operations to ensure smooth service flow.

2
